---
format:
  revealjs:
    include-after-body:
      - "tabset-full.html"
---

## Switching Tabsets

Press → and ← to toggle tabsets

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Tab A

Content for `Tab A`

### Tab B

Content for `Tab B`

### Tab C

Content for `Tab C`

:::

::: {.fragment .tabswitch}
:::

::: {.fragment .tabswitch}
:::
